title: carex × auroniensis
intro: Carex × auroniensis, also known as auron sedge or Carex × auroniensis, is a hybrid plant species within the Carex genus, resulting from the cross-pollination of Carex digitata and Carex montana. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its potential to be used as a diuretic and to aid in the treatment of urinary tract infections. The health benefits of Carex × auroniensis include its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with kidney stones and bladder problems. In traditional herbal medicine, Carex × auroniensis is often prepared in teas, infusions, or dried and powdered forms for its medicinal and therapeutic uses.
